name: SafeSubstring
description: Safely gets a substring of a given length from a string, without causing an out-of-bounds exception.
signature: public static string SafeSubstring(string input, int maxLength)

parameters.name: maxLength
parameters.description: The maximum length of the substring.

name: IsAbsoluteUrl
description: Checks if a given URL is an absolute URL.

name: RemoveDiacritics
description: Removes diacritics (accents) from a string.

name: DeCode
description: Decodes a string that was encoded by converting each character to its integer value, separated by dots.

name: EnCode
description: Encodes a string by converting each character to its integer value, separated by dots.

name: DecodeCSV
description: Decodes a comma-separated string where each value was encoded using the EnCode method.

name: CreateFolder
description: Creates a folder if it does not already exist.

parameters.name: folderMapPath
parameters.description: The physical path of the folder to create.

name: DeleteFolder
description: Deletes a folder.
signature: public static void DeleteFolder(string folderMapPath, bool recursive = false)

parameters.name: folderMapPath
parameters.description: The physical path of the folder to delete.

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: If true, deletes the folder and all its contents.

name: FormatToSave
description: Formats a string for saving, applying scripting protection.

name: FormatToSave
description: Formats a string for saving based on its data type, applying scripting protection.
signature: public static string FormatToSave(string inpData, TypeCode dataTyp)

parameters.name: dataTyp
parameters.description: The data type of the input.

name: FormatDisableScripting
description: Removes potentially malicious HTML tags and scripts from a string to prevent XSS attacks.
signature: public static string FormatDisableScripting(string strInput, bool filterlinks = true)

name: FormatToSave
description: Formats data for saving to XML, converting it to a culture-invariant format.
signature: public static string FormatToSave(string inpData, TypeCode dataTyp, string editlang)

parameters.name: editlang
parameters.description: The culture code of the input data.

name: IsCultureInfo
description: Checks if a given string is a valid culture code.

name: FormatToDisplay
description: Formats data for display, converting it from a culture-invariant format to a culture-specific format.
signature: public static string FormatToDisplay(string inpData, string cultureCode, TypeCode dataTyp, string formatCode = "")

name: FormatDateToString
description: Formats a DateTime object into a string based on a specific culture.
signature: public static string FormatDateToString(DateTime dateTime, string cultureCode)

name: IsEmail
description: Checks if a string is a valid email address.

name: IsNumeric
description: Checks if an object can be converted to a numeric value, optionally using a specific culture.
signature: public static bool IsNumeric(object expression, string cultureCode = "")

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: The culture code to use for parsing.

name: IsUriValid
description: Checks if a string is a well-formed URI and can optionally check if the host exists.
signature: public static bool IsUriValid(string uri, UriKind uriKind  = UriKind.RelativeOrAbsolute, bool checkexists = false)

parameters.name: checkexists
parameters.description: If true, performs a DNS lookup to see if the host exists.

name: IsDate
description: Checks if an object can be converted to a DateTime value using a specific culture.
signature: public static bool IsDate(object expression, string cultureCode)

parameters.name: cultureCode
parameters.description: The culture code to use for parsing.

name: IsDateInvariantCulture
description: Checks if an object can be converted to a DateTime value using a set of common invariant culture formats.

name: FormatAsMailTo
description: Creates a 'mailto' link that is obfuscated to protect the email address from scrapers.
signature: public static string FormatAsMailTo(string email, string subject = "", string visibleText = "")

parameters.name: visibleText
parameters.description: The visible text for the link.

name: DeleteSysFile
description: Deletes a file, ignoring any exceptions if the file is locked.

parameters.name: filePathName
parameters.description: The path to the file to delete.

name: CleanInput
description: Strips out characters from a string that do not match a given regular expression.
signature: public static string CleanInput(string strIn, string regexpr = "")

parameters.name: regexpr
parameters.description: The regular expression to match allowed characters.

name: AlphaNumeric
description: Strips out all non-alphanumeric characters from a string.

name: Numeric
description: Strips out all non-numeric characters from a string.

name: UrlFriendly
description: Converts a string into a URL-friendly format (e.g., 'like-this-one').

name: SanitizeFileName
description: Sanitizes a file name by removing diacritics and invalid file name characters.

name: RemapInternationalCharToAscii
description: Remaps common international characters to their ASCII equivalents.

name: StripAccents
description: Strips accents from a string.

name: GetUniqueString
description: Generates a highly unique, URL-safe string based on the current time and a random number.

parameters.name: randomsize
parameters.description: The size of the random key to append.

name: GetRandomKey
description: Generates a random string of a specified size. Not guaranteed to be unique.
signature: public static string GetRandomKey(int maxSize = 0, bool numericOnly = false)

parameters.name: maxSize
parameters.description: The size of the key. If 0, returns a GUID-based key.

parameters.name: numericOnly
parameters.description: If true, the key will only contain numbers.

name: GetGuidKey
description: Generates a URL-safe key from a new GUID.

name: ReplaceFirstOccurrence
description: Replaces the first occurrence of a substring within a string.
signature: public static string ReplaceFirstOccurrence(string source, string find, string replace)

name: ReplaceLastOccurrence
description: Replaces the last occurrence of a substring within a string.
signature: public static string ReplaceLastOccurrence(string source, string find, string replace)

name: Decrypt
description: Decrypts a string using DES encryption with a given key.
signature: public static string Decrypt(string strKey, string strData)

name: Encrypt
description: Encrypts a string using DES encryption with a given key.
signature: public static string Encrypt(string strKey, string strData)

name: ReplaceFileExt
description: Replaces the extension of a file path with a new extension.
signature: public static string ReplaceFileExt(string fileName, string newExt)

name: StrToByteArray
description: Converts a string to a byte array using UTF8 encoding.

name: ObjectToByteArray
description: Serializes an object into a byte array.

name: CopyAll
description: Recursively copies all files and subdirectories from a source to a target directory.
signature: public static void CopyAll(string source, string target)

name: CopyAll
description: Recursively copies all files and subdirectories from a source to a target directory.
signature: public static void CopyAll(DirectoryInfo source, DirectoryInfo target)

name: GetMd5Hash
description: Computes the MD5 hash of a string.

name: GetMd5Hash
description: Computes the MD5 hash of a string, with an option for uppercase or lowercase output.
signature: public static string GetMd5Hash(string input, bool uppercase)

parameters.name: uppercase
parameters.description: If true, the hash is returned in uppercase.

name: Base64Encode
description: Encodes a string into Base64 format.

name: Base64Decode
description: Decodes a Base64-encoded string.

name: AddJsonNetRootAttribute
description: Adds the Json.NET namespace attribute to the root element of a SimplisityInfo's XML document.
signature: public static void AddJsonNetRootAttribute(ref SimplisityInfo sInfo)

name: AddJsonArrayAttributesForXPath
description: Adds the Json.NET 'Array=true' attribute to all XML elements matching an XPath expression.
signature: public static void AddJsonArrayAttributesForXPath(string xpath, ref SimplisityInfo sInfo)

name: CopyDirectory
description: Copies a directory and its contents to a new location.
signature: public static void CopyDirectory(string sourceDir, string destinationDir, bool recursive)

name: HtmlToPlainText
description: Converts an HTML string to plain text by stripping out tags.

name: EscapeJsonString
description: Escapes special characters in a string to make it safe for inclusion in a JSON string.
